description_long: This is a dark brown, freestanding wooden cabinet with a classic rectangular shape and paneled double doors on the front. The cabinet features subtle wood grain texture and is accented by thin, slightly recessed borders around each panel. Two small round knobs are present on the front doors, suggesting they can be opened to access the interior storage space. The sides and back are plain, with the back being a solid, unadorned panel. The cabinet stands on four short feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its robust construction and traditional design make it suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or offices.
description: A dark brown, paneled wooden cabinet with double doors and small round knobs, standing on four short feet. Its classic design and solid build make it ideal for storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with small round knobs and subtle wood grain texture.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat panel with visible wood grain and no additional features.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a solid, unadorned panel with a central seam and no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, flat panel and wood grain.
